creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Martin, thanks for report.

I can confirm, that I am not able to load kml files via the vector layer input dialog on FreeBSD, QGIS 2.4.1 any more. Instead, QGIS dies on signal 11.

On Windows 7 reading kml files with version 2.14.1 works as expected.

Can you please tell me, 

- what is your FreeBSD version and platform? 
- what is your prefered way to read in kml files, exactly? 
- what do you mean by 'have tried updating the plugins, to no avail'?

I will investigate, but this may take some time, because I am very busy these days, sorry.
